memoryArtifacts.headline: Page 627. Bulkeley of Cheadle-Bulkeley and Beaumaris. Vol III, 1882. George Omerod
memoryArtifacts.description:
Page 627. Vol III. 1882
The History of the County Palatine and City of Chester; Compiled from Original Evidences in Public Offices, The Harleian and Cottonian MSS. , Parochial Registers, Private Muniments, Unpublished MS. Collections of Successive Cheshire Antiquaries, and A personal survey of every township in the county ; Incorporated with a republication of King's Vale Royal, And Leycester's Cheshire Antiquities.
By George Ormerod, Esq. , LL.D. F.R.S. & F.S.A.  
In 3 Volumes, Volume III,
First Edition, 1819 - 472 pages
Second Edition, 1882 
Revised and Enlarged 1882 - 879 Pages
By Thomas Helsby, Esq. , of Lincoln's Inn, Barrister-at-Law.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margery Venables , Baroness於1369年出生在英國英格蘭爾金德頓時，她的父親Hugh de Venables39歲，母親Margery Cotton34歲。她於大約1387年與Sir Richard Bulkeley . kt , Knight在英國爾黑阿德爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1459年在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福享年90歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margery Venables , Baroness于1369年出生在英国英格兰爾金德頓时，她的父亲Hugh de Venables39岁，母亲Margery Cotton34岁。她于大约1387年与Sir Richard Bulkeley . kt , Knight在英国爾黑阿德爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1459年在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福享年90岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Baroness
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: old variant of Barsnes (and, in North America, probably also an altered form of this), a habitational name from a farmstead so named in the county of Sogn og Fjordane, possibly from a compound of the Old Norse personal name Baldrekr + nes ‘point, headland’.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margery Venables , Baroness was born in 1369, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh de Venables, was 39 and her mother, Margery Cotton, was 34. She married Sir Richard Bulkeley . kt , Knight about 1387, in Cheadle, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1459, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 90, and was buried in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margery Venables , Baroness est née en 1369, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Venables, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margery Cotton, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Bulkeley . kt , Knight environ 1387, à Cheadle, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1459, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterrée à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margery Venables , Baroness 1369 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Venables 39 und ihre Mutter Margery Cotton 34. Sie hat um 1387 in Cheadle, Cheshire, England Sir Richard Bulkeley . kt , Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1459 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margery Venables , Baroness è nata il nel 1369 nel Kinderton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh de Venables, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Margery Cotton, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Bulkeley . kt , Knight circa 1387, nel Cheadle, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1459, nel Over Peover, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolta a Over Peover, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margery Venables , Baronessが1369年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Venablesは39歳，母Margery Cottonは34歳であった。約1387年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェアドルでSir Richard Bulkeley . kt , Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1459年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで90歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margery Venables , Baroness(이)가 1369년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Venables(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Cotton(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1387년 영국 체실르 체아들일에서 Sir Richard Bulkeley . kt , Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 프오버에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 프오버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margery Venables , Baroness nasceu em 1369, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh de Venables, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margery Cotton, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Bulkeley . kt , Knight aproximadamente 1387, em Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1459, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 90 anos, e foi sepultada em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margery Venables , Baroness родилась в 1369 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh de Venables было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Cotton, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Bulkeley . kt , Knight около 1387 г. в местности чидл, чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1459 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 90 лет и была похоронена в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margery Venables , Baroness nació en 1369, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh de Venables, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margery Cotton, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Bulkeley . kt , Knight aproximadamente 1387, en Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1459, en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultada en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
